name: Szechuan Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons oil (canola or peanut with sesame oil added)
1 pound broccoli stalks, sliced into flowerettes and ends
2 cups cooked beef, sliced 1 x 3 inches
recipeInstructions:
1. Use your choice of oils or mix canola and peanut oil with a dash of sesame oil.
2. Prepare all vegetables and meat before starting to cook the recipe.
3. In a small bowl, combine sherry, oyster sauce, water, red pepper flakes, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Heat pan over medium heat and add the oil.
5. Stir in ginger and garlic; stir-fry for one minute.
6. Add broccoli; stir-fry for three minutes.
7. Add red and green peppers, celery, and green onions; stir-fry for three minutes.
8. Add sherry-cornstarch mixture and cooked beef; stir-fry for three minutes.
9. Add water chestnuts and stir-fry for one minute more.
